items.name: Repulsive
items.description: If an opposing card would attack this card, negate that attack.

items.name: Disentomb

items.name: Skeletal Horde
items.description: When this card is played, search as many “Skeleton” cards from your deck as it takes to fill all empty spaces on the board, then play them all.

items.name: Double Death
items.description: While this card is on the field, any cards that perish on your side of the field will generate twice the bones and activate any On Death sigils twice.

items.name: Creeping Outwards

items.name: Ant Eater

items.name: Incorporeal

items.name: Vampiric Balm

items.name: Skeleton Crew

items.name: Handy

items.name: Focused
items.description: This card cannot deal direct damage.

items.name: Scorching Skin

items.name: Puppet Master

items.name: Swapper

items.description: When this card takes damage, it only receives half the damage it normally would, rounded up.

items.name: Wavering Allegiance

items.name: Trifurcated When Powered

items.name: Brittle Latch

items.name: Gem Powered
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of gems provided on your side of the field, to a maximum of 5.

items.name: Hefty
items.description: During your end step, this card shifts to an adjacent lane, pushing cards in the way with it.

items.name: Facsimile
items.description: This cards’ power is equal to the opposing cards’ power.

items.name: Insulting Sacrifice
items.description: This card only provides half a blood point when sacrificed.

items.name: Morsel
items.description: When this card is sacrificed to play another card, that card adds this card’s stats to its own.

items.name: Bifurcated Strike
items.description: This card attacks only the lanes left and right of the opposing space when it attacks.

items.name: Trifurcated Strike
items.description: This card attacks the lanes left and right of, as well as, the opposing space when it attacks.

items.name: Hoarder
items.description: When this card is played, search any 1 card from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Burrower
items.description: If an opposing card would attack an empty lane, this card moves to be hit instead.

items.name: Taunt
items.description: Attacks targetting adjacent cards hit this one instead.

items.name: Green Gem
items.description: While this card is on the field it provides 1 Emerald Gem.

items.name: Overclocked
items.description: When this card kills another card, it provides an energy cell to its owner.

items.name: Strong Hand
items.description: This cards’ power is equal to the number of cards in the owners’ hand, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Lurker
items.description: If this card attacked last turn, it does not attack this turn.

items.name: Waterborne
items.description: Attacks targeting this card instead hit the owner of this card directly.

items.name: Aquanaut
items.description: If the opposing card has the waterborne sigil, this card attacks it directly.

items.name: Tentacleful
items.description: Attacks targeting this card instead hit the owner of this card directly. During your next draw step, it is shuffled back into your deck and replaced by any other “Tentacle” card, that card will act as if it has this sigil.

items.name: Fecundity
items.description: When this card is played, search 1 copy of it from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Battery Powered
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of times its owner has spent energy this turn, up to a maximum of 5.

items.name: Fledgling
items.description: During your next draw step after this card is played, it ages into a “[Token]”.

items.name: Brood Parasite
items.description: When this card is played, play 1 “Broken Egg” card in the opposing space if that space is empty.

items.name: Sprinter
items.description: During your end step, this card shifts to an adjacent empty lane.

items.name: Corpse Eater
items.description: When a card on your side of the field perishes by battle, this card is played in its place.

items.name: Unkillable
items.description: When this card perishes, it goes back to your hand instead of being discarded.

items.name: Fleeting
items.description: During the second end step after this card had been played, it will not perish.

items.name: Many Lives
items.description: When this card is sacrificed, it does not perish.

items.name: Mighty Leap
items.description: If the opposing card has the Airborne sigil, it attacks this card instead of attacking directly.

items.name: One-Half Bones
items.description: This card’s power is equal to half the number of bones the owner of this card has collected, rounded down.

items.name: Guardian
items.description: When an opposing card is played opposite of an empty space, this card moves to that space.

items.name: Worthy Sacrifice
items.description: This card is worth 3 blood when it is sacrificed.

items.name: Bell Ringer
items.description: During either end step, this cards’ power increases by 1, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Bees Within
items.description: When this card is damaged, search 1 “Bee” from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Brittle
items.description: During your end step, this card perishes.

items.name: Dam Builder
items.description: When this card is played, play a “Dam” card is adjacent empty lanes.

items.name: Airborne
items.description: This card attacks the opponent directly instead of the opposing card.

items.name: Ant Spawner
items.description: When this card is played, search 1 “Worker Ant” from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Colony
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of cards with the Colony sigil on your side of the field.

items.name: Amorphous
items.description: When this card is played, select 1 card from your discard pile. This card gains the selected cards’ sigils until it perishes.

items.name: Leader
items.description: While this card is on the field increase the power of the cards left and right by 1.

items.name: Touch Of Death
items.description: When this card damages an opposing card, that card perishes.
